Our Dare to Dream mentorship program pairs adults with youth for a one-year commitment—you'd meet with your mentee twice a month to build a meaningful relationship and help them grow. We handle the matching, and we cover the cost of any background check required. It's a chance to make a real difference in a young person's life!

We match adults with youth for one-on-one mentoring—it's called Dare to Dream. You'd meet with your mentee twice a month for a year, helping them with life skills, goals, and just being a steady presence in their life. We handle the matching, and we cover the cost of any background check needed.

Our Dare to Dream mentorship program pairs adult mentors with young people for a year-long relationship with twice-monthly meetings—it's all about building real connection and helping youth grow. Mentors go through a background check (we cover the cost) and get support from our team along the way. It's a meaningful way to make a direct impact on a young person's life.
